texto: I hate when counselors and teachers blame everything on low self-esteem in teens. Some of us actually have self-esteem, believe it or not. And when we make mistakes, it's not because of a defect in our psyche. We screw up just because.
explicacao: Citação de Niki Burnham sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “I hate when counselors and teachers blame everything on low self-esteem in teens. Some of us actu…” articula autoestima, teen, young-adult em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como young-adult.
